hero.name: TAHA EL BAH
hero.tagline: Building APIs that scale. Systems that last.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Software Engineer with 5+ internships and production experience. I specialize in building scalable, API-driven backends with Spring Boot and PostgreSQL. I've delivered 25+ production APIs, optimized endpoints to sub-200ms, and shipped full-stack products used by real users.

projects.title: What I've Built
projects.project1Desc: Production backend powering a service marketplace. 25+ versioned REST APIs, JWT + role-based auth (client/provider/admin), p95 latency under 200ms.
projects.project2Desc: ML-driven trading recommendation engine with real-time market data ingestion, Python prediction pipeline, and React dashboard for visualising insights.
projects.project3Desc: Full-stack e-commerce platform with custom admin dashboard, WooCommerce sync for products/orders/inventory, deployed with CI/CD automation.
projects.project4Desc: Multi-role platform (admin, teacher, student) with class scheduling, payment tracking, and automated email notifications.

experience.title: My Journey
experience.job1Bullet1: Architected service marketplace backend (Spring Boot, PostgreSQL)
experience.job1Bullet2: Built & versioned 25+ REST APIs, p95 under 200ms
experience.job2Bullet1: Shipped Java + React features across 2 release cycles
experience.job2Bullet2: Resolved 15+ code-quality issues via peer reviews
experience.job3Bullet1: Fine-tuned classification models: 89% accuracy (+7pts over baseline)
experience.job4Bullet1: Optimised slow SQL queries, cut report generation time by ~30%
experience.job5Bullet1: Built Employee Management System (200+ records, Java/Spring Boot/MySQL)
experience.job5Bullet2: Introduced Agile sprint cadence to intern team
experience.job6Bullet1: Secondary field: Data Analytics | English-taught | IELTS C1
